unhostedWallets.notes: AUSTRAC Reform 2026 requires due diligence on transfers involving self-hosted wallets.

rules.notes: AML/CTF Amendment Bill passed late 2024. General obligations effective March 31, 2026; travel rule for virtual asset transfers effective July 1, 2026. Zero threshold — applies to all virtual asset transfers regardless of value. No crypto-specific travel rule existed prior to this reform. Sources: AUSTRAC Travel Rule Reform (https://www.austrac.gov.au/amlctf-reform/reforms-guidance/other-guidance/travel-rule-reform); AML/CTF Amendment Bill 2024 (see AUSTRAC reform page for full text).
